title: Merthyr Tydfil: Martin Evans House
body: "Office address and contact details  Martin Evans HouseAvenue De ClichyMerthyr TydfilCF47 8LD   See map  Office phone number: 01685 702 630  Office email address: HMPPSWalesCorrespondence@justice.gov.uk  Opening times   Monday, 9am to 5pm Tuesday, 9am to 7pm Wednesday, 9am to 5pm Thursday, 9am to 5pm Friday, 9am to 4.30pm Saturday, closed Sunday, closed Bank holidays, closed   Getting here Find this probation contact centre, on a map.  Walking  15-minute walk from Merthyr Tydfil train station   To plan your journey by public transport Please use TFWrail to plan your journey.  Parking  no visitor parking available local car parks are available in the area   Accessibility facilities  disabled access and disabled toilet the building has hearing enhancement facilities available by prior arrangement assistance dogs are welcome   Court Buildings Find a court or tribunal building.  Local approved premises See the list of approved premises in your area.  Problems and complaints If you have any problems or complaints contact the office directly. You can also report any problems with this page at this address HMPPSWalesCorrespondence@justice.gov.uk.  If you can’t resolve the problem directly, you can make a complaint to HM Prison and Probation Service.  "
